_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.
_session_32_note: Session 32 (2026-05-29): NVDA deep session (event_queue; Computex June 1 keynote imminent — 1 day away). Key new findings: (1) MediaTek abruptly pulled from Computex keynote slot — NVIDIA commands full June 1 stage for N1X ARM laptop SoC reveal (TSMC N3P, 20-core ARM CPU + Blackwell 6,144 CUDA = RTX 5070 class, 128GB LPDDR5x-8533, TDP 65-120W); (2) MRVL -9% post-earnings 'sell the news' on May 28 (from $221 to ~$201); FY2028 $15B management guidance intact; HSBC Buy $300 PT; (3) MU crossed $1T market cap (May 26), $985 intraday ATH (May 28), closed $928.41 (+3.6%), UBS $1,625 PT. Phase 1b/1c gated (32%6=2). No DCF run (all tickers within 30-day window). next_deep_session kept as NVDA — June 1 keynote processing is session 33's absolute priority.

event_queue.event: Computex June 1 (Mon) GTC Taipei keynote 11am Taipei (Sun May 31 10pm Manila). Session 32 pre-event: MediaTek pulled from keynote slot — NVIDIA takes full stage for N1X ARM laptop chip (TSMC N3P, 20-core ARM + RTX 5070 GPU, 128GB LPDDR5x). Session 33 absolute priority: capture actual keynote — Vera Rubin NVL72 official production volume guidance; N1X official specs; Dynamo 1.0 GA; any 'surprise product' beyond N1X; Vera CPU pricing and availability.

Computex June 2 joint keynote: Matt Murphy + Jensen Huang ('The Future of AI Depends on Connectivity'). NVLink Fusion showcase; Google TPU/MPU volume update; 4th hyperscaler (Meta MTIA) confirmation; Scorpio X vs. XConn head-to-head. Context: May 28 post-earnings -9% to ~$201 (from $221); HSBC Buy $300 PT; FY2028 $15B management guidance intact. Session 33/34: update MRVL entity after keynote.

Computex June 3 press conference + Scorpio X 320-lane live demo (10-11am Taipei). Head-to-head vs. MRVL XConn PCIe 6 switch. Northland downgrade to Market Perform (May 26, no PT). Session 33/34: update ALAB entity after Computex outcome.

Price +3.6% on May 28 to $928.41 (new ATH close); $985 intraday ATH; $1T market cap crossed May 26. DCF last run May 26 (IV $442.63, MoS -52.3%). Q3 FY2026 earnings ~June 25 is the next major catalyst. No deep session needed before earnings; process after Computex cycle clears.

_event_queue_note: Session 32: NVDA deep session (MediaTek keynote slot pull; N1X TSMC N3P confirmed). Computex cycle June 1-3 still pending. MRVL updated with post-earnings drop context. MU added for >3% price move. After Computex cycle (June 1-5) processed, queue order: NVDA (keynote) → MRVL (June 2) → ALAB (June 3) → MU (earnings ~June 25). next_deep_session = NVDA for June 1 keynote processing (session 33).
